scope: FQ-01: player health, damage, healing, and death loop — survivability becomes a visible, tunable, tested system.
summary: Health UI: HUD bar via the existing bar factory with a 'current / max' readout, low-health tint below a data-driven fraction with a once-per-crossing 'You are badly hurt.' message, and a 0.2s red sprite flash on damage. Damage: i-frame duration moved from a hardcoded 0.8s to player_defaults.hurt_cooldown_sec; live enemies (surface_slime, cave_crawler, raider_basic) carry contact_damage/speed/hp in enemies.json, contact damage scaled by difficulty('enemy') at spawn. Healing: eat_food action (H) consumes 1 food and heals food_heal_amount (25) only below max; passive regen (1 hp/s) only within safe_radius_px (160) of the Town Hall when no threat is within 200px, with a first-time recovery message. Death: lethal damage applies a deterministic floor(stack x 0.25) loss to each carried stack, respawns at the hall at full health, and only claims 'Some of your supplies were lost.' when a stack actually shrank. Signal became health_changed(health, max_health); save schema unchanged (0.5). Ancestry health effects preserved (orc bonus, goblin reduction round only when a reduction applies — review fix).
acceptance: Damage updates the health bar; two same-window hits apply once (fq01_iframes_block_same_window_damage); expired cooldown lets the next hit land
Eating heals and consumes exactly 1 food below max; no-op at full health
Passive regen ticks near the hall and never far from it
Collapse respawns at the hall at full health with dirt 8->6 / stone 5->4 (floor 25%) and honest messaging (lootless collapse says nothing about supplies)
Save/load restores current health and ancestry/trait max_health modifiers
Runtime enemy contact damage equals JSON value x difficulty('enemy')

Smoke 134/134 (was 124) on windowed Godot 4.6.1 at 2026-07-04T12:39:15; validator RESULT scaffold_valid incl. new player_defaults and live-enemy field checks; capsule doctor healthy; git diff --check clean
validation: COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited windowed run -> 134/134 PASS incl. ten fq01_* checks
decisions: Healing sources for v0.7 are eat-food (active) and hall-proximity safe regen (passive); bandages/medicine deferred to a later item
Collapse penalty is deterministic per-stack floor loss rather than a ground-drop (no ground-item mechanic exists) or durability loss (no durability system yet)
player_defaults lives in character_data.json rather than world_settings.json so per-world difficulty stays separate from player-constant tuning
enemies.json hp is data-completeness only for now; runtime hp still comes from the difficulty-scaled registry path (documented in VARIABLE_MATRIX)
Review BLOCKER fixed pre-commit: respawn message no longer claims supply loss when nothing was lost; guarded by a dedicated smoke check

Orchestration: Explore recon -> sonnet implementation -> orchestrator-driven Windows verification -> sonnet review -> orchestrator fixes; all verification ran on the operator machine because the sandbox mount serves stale content
risks: Feel/tuning (regen rate, i-frames, loss fraction) untested by human play; all data-tunable
save_manager.apply_state trusts in-memory max_health on the F9 hot path — safe until buffs/debuffs can mutate max_health mid-session (revisit at FQ-04/FQ-05)
Passive-regen threat scan is O(threats) per tick; fine at current densities
next_action: FQ-02: background trees and pass-through flora.
